_note: Site features (existing trees & rock outcrops) for the Boalo parcel. Coordinates are FRACTIONAL within the parcel bounding box — frac [fx, fy] where fx=0 is the west edge, fx=1 the east edge, fy=0 the north edge, fy=1 the south edge. They are resolved to lat/lng at runtime against whatever the REAL parcel geometry is (Catastro INSPIRE), so the features always land on the true parcel instead of a hardcoded (and previously wrong) footprint. SOURCE = 'visual-estimate': hand-read from a satellite/aerial screenshot — NOT survey-grade. Replace with the LiDAR CHM + PNOA-ortho fusion (scripts/bake-features) and the field inventario de arbolado. role: avoid = no build; anchor = premium siting adjacent; both = keep AND site villas at the edge (Echo on the granite shoulder, Duo along the oak line).

features.name: North-centre encina stand
features.note: Densest holm-oak cluster; keep as green, site Duos along its south edge (oak line).

features.name: West oak clump
features.note: Mid-slope holm-oak clump; anchor Duos on its lee.

features.name: Central oak scatter
features.note: Scattered oaks along the central band; premium siting between them.

features.name: Central granite outcrop
features.note: Main berrocal; no excavation. Echo units on the granite shoulder beside it for the view.

features.name: Lower-centre outcrops
features.note: Rock exposure on the lower slope; build-around.

features.name: East vaguada (green finger)
features.note: Damper hollow with richer vegetation — possible watercourse/DPH setback; keep as green corridor, verify on the ground.
